comment: Fixture de referência derivado do formato de produção (orchestrator_service.py/_build_prompt_with_context + system_prompt.txt). Usado no teste de fidelidade (TAREFA-316).
question: What is BRCA1 and its role in breast cancer?

chunks.text: BRCA1 mutations confer a lifetime breast cancer risk of 55 to 72 percent in carriers.
BRCA1 is a tumor suppressor gene located on chromosome 17q21.
